# This directory holds the human-readable reports and machine-readable
# indexes produced by the various `npm run` commands.
#
# Auto-generated files (all gitignored, recreated on each run):
#   - doctor.md
#   - work-patterns.md
#   - idea-log-inventory.md
#   - source-scan-summary.json
#   - output-index.md
#   - output-index.json
#   - monthly/YYYY-MM.md
#   - yearly/YYYY.md
#   - *.log
#   - console-*.png  (taken during development)
#
# Before the first run of `npm run archive` (or any other reporting
# command), this directory is empty by design.
